title: Vanilla Enhanced Beds
description: Change beds to add them detail with little pixel arts of different minecraft mobs!
body:
This resource pack changes the default and boring minecraft beds to new unique beds that contain different pixel arts of minecraft mobs depending on the color of the bed in a vanilla style!!

We have now a version with custom 3D Models!

**For this to work you need CEM support, mods like entity model features (EMF) help with that**

![3D beds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/439720bbe8389d733c1f60772cf929936c290bb6.png)



If you want vanilla beds you can just use the normal version


Please credit me if you want to use this on other packs and do not distribute it as yours
